SELECT event_time, minute(event_time) AS event_minute FROM test_dates;
SELECT minute(event_time) AS event_minute FROM (SELECT event_time FROM test_dates WHERE event_time > timestamp '2021-01-01 00:00:00') AS filtered_dates;

SELECT t1.event_time, minute(t1.event_time) AS minute_part FROM (SELECT event_time FROM test_dates) AS t1 JOIN (SELECT event_time FROM test_dates WHERE minute(event_time) = 30) AS t2 ON t1.event_time < t2.event_time;
SELECT MINUTE(t1.event_time) FROM (SELECT event_time FROM test_dates WHERE event_time >= timestamp '2021-01-01 00:00:00' AND event_time < timestamp '2021-01-02 00:00:00') AS t1;
SELECT DISTINCT minute(event_time) FROM test_dates WHERE minute(event_time) IN (SELECT minute(event_time) FROM test_dates WHERE event_time < timestamp '2022-01-01 00:00:00');
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT minute(event_time) AS event_minute FROM test_dates GROUP BY event_minute) AS grouped_minutes;
WITH MinuteCounts AS (SELECT minute(event_time) AS minute_part, COUNT(*) AS count FROM test_dates GROUP BY minute_part) SELECT * FROM MinuteCounts WHERE count > 1;
CREATE TABLE date_summary AS SELECT minute(event_time) AS minute_part, COUNT(*) AS occurrences FROM test_dates GROUP BY minute_part;
